emails.subject: Re: Draft EOL Termination Letter
emails.body: I have not received any comments. I consider it final. Let me know if you need to have it customized for any particular circumstance. Since I don't know who (or for that matter what) the PCG heads are, I sugggest that if they need it you send them copies. David Forster 02/13/2000 04:23 PM

emails.subject: Re: Draft EOL Termination Letter
emails.body: No rest for the wicked, huh? I'd offer to take you out for that drink tonight, but I need to pick up Avril from the airport in an hour. Hope you got to enjoy at least some of your weekend. . Dave
